claim_pointer: Title “universal therapeutic vulnerability”; Abstract and Discussion universal claims
evidence_pointer: Methods report eight single-cell patients, one 72-patient single-centre resection cohort, two cell lines, and one ten-mouse Huh7 experiment
concern: The evidence does not demonstrate a transferable principle or consequence across HCC settings or an interdisciplinary Nature-level advance.
resolution_test: Provide independent human and mechanistic validation across prespecified aetiologies, treatment settings, and relevant models, or remove universal framing and reassess target.

claim_pointer: Impact and implications and Discussion claims immediate anti-PD-1 treatment selection
evidence_pointer: Score construction used a resection-survival cohort with full-data tuning and no immunotherapy-benefit design, external validation, calibration, decision curve, or baseline comparison
concern: A retrospective prognostic association cannot establish anti-PD-1 benefit, deployment, or clinical utility.
resolution_test: Validate a locked score in an independent intended-use comparative-treatment cohort with interaction, calibration, clinical baselines, and decision utility, or narrow the claims.

claim_pointer: Abstract, Results, and Discussion causal therapeutic and anti-PD-1 sensitization claims
evidence_pointer: Functional experiments used one guide without rescue or immune assay; all mice received anti-PD-1 and no treatment interaction was tested
concern: The reported phenotypes do not establish the causal therapeutic advance on which the claimed novelty depends.
resolution_test: Show EVA1-specific causality and a prespecified, replicated EVA1-by-anti-PD-1 interaction in an immune-relevant system, or lower the claims.

claim_pointer: Introduction “none” and “first clinically actionable” priority claims
evidence_pointer: Only two references were supplied; relevant literature and cited full texts were unavailable and browsing was prohibited
concern: Field-wide priority and originality cannot be established from the supplied evidence.
resolution_test: Provide a current claim-specific literature comparison and retain priority language only if directly supported.

claim_pointer: Abstract “causal driver”; Results “directly suppresses anti-tumour immunity”
evidence_pointer: Functional experiments used one guide in two lines without second guide, rescue, target engagement, or immune-cell co-culture
concern: Guide-specific or secondary cell-state effects can explain the phenotype, so EVA1-specific immune causality is not established.
resolution_test: Reproduce with independent and orthogonal perturbations, quantify target engagement, rescue with guide-resistant EVA1, and reverse immune-functional phenotypes.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Results anti-PD-1 sensitization claims
evidence_pointer: Mouse experiment compared control and EVA1-depleted tumours while every mouse received anti-PD-1
concern: The design cannot distinguish sensitization from the reported anti-PD-1-independent growth phenotype.
resolution_test: Run an adequately powered, randomized, blinded 2-by-2 EVA1 perturbation by anti-PD-1 study with a prespecified interaction, survival, and target engagement.

claim_pointer: Introduction and Discussion direct anti-tumour immunity and universal immune-evasion claims
evidence_pointer: Subcutaneous Huh7 xenograft; immune infiltration absent; host strain, immune competence, antibody cross-reactivity, and humanization not reported
concern: The in-vivo phenotype may be tumour-intrinsic and the unreported host context may not support the invoked PD-1 immune mechanism.
resolution_test: Specify and validate host and antibody context, then show EVA1-dependent functional immune changes in an immunocompetent matched or validated humanized model.

claim_pointer: Results interprets inverse correlation as EVA1 excluding T cells
evidence_pointer: EVA1 and T-cell score correlation across eight tumours, r=-0.41 and P=0.03
concern: The cross-sectional association cannot distinguish exclusion from composition, aetiology, or a shared tumour state.
resolution_test: Combine spatial localization with controlled EVA1 gain or loss and functional T-cell recruitment, activation, killing, and rescue tests.

claim_pointer: Results claims PD-L1 and interferon transcripts show direct immune suppression
evidence_pointer: Growth and immune readouts were measured in the same 72-hour cultures, where growth fell 24% and 19%
concern: The molecular readouts may be consequences of altered viability, proliferation, stress, or cell-cycle composition.
resolution_test: Show temporal ordering before growth divergence, match viable cell state, quantify pathway intermediates, and demonstrate immune-cell function.

claim_pointer: Title, Impact statement, and Discussion universal and all-aetiology mechanism claims
evidence_pointer: Functional testing used Huh7 and Hep3B and one Huh7 xenograft; the cohort was virally enriched and model provenance was not reported
concern: The EVA1 phenotype may be restricted to the tested cell states and is not shown to generalize across HCC diversity.
resolution_test: Validate specific immune phenotypes across diverse HCC and patient-derived models with prespecified heterogeneity tests, or narrow claims.

claim_pointer: Impact statement and Discussion claims score-guided anti-PD-1 selection
evidence_pointer: Study population is 72 resected adults with overall survival; no anti-PD-1 target cohort, response endpoint, comparator, or treatment interaction is reported
concern: The design evaluates prognosis after resection, not differential anti-PD-1 benefit or decision improvement.
resolution_test: Restrict to resection prognosis or test a locked score in an independent anti-PD-1-eligible comparative cohort with interaction and decision utility.

claim_pointer: Abstract causal driver and Results direct immune-suppression claims
evidence_pointer: One guide, no second guide, rescue, target engagement, or immune-cell co-culture; only tumour-cell growth and markers measured
concern: One guide without rescue cannot establish EVA1 specificity, and tumour-only cultures cannot demonstrate immune escape.
resolution_test: Use two validated perturbations, guide-resistant rescue, target engagement, and a controlled tumour-immune functional assay.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Results anti-PD-1 sensitization claims
evidence_pointer: All ten mice received anti-PD-1; cage-order allocation, unblinded measurement, no independent replicate, and absent immune and target-persistence readouts
concern: The experiment lacks the factorial counterfactual required for sensitization and has allocation and measurement risks.
resolution_test: Run a randomized, blinded, replicated 2-by-2 design in an immune-relevant model and require a reproducible interaction with target and immune readouts.

claim_pointer: Ethics states only compliance with institutional requirements
evidence_pointer: Ethics says committee, protocol number, consent, animal protocol, and humane endpoints are not reported
concern: Human and animal approval, consent or waiver, welfare, and humane-endpoint compliance cannot be verified.
resolution_test: Report oversight bodies, approval IDs, consent or waiver, welfare monitoring, humane endpoints, and euthanasia criteria reconciled to approvals.

claim_pointer: Abstract AUC and Discussion “validated in an independent subset”
evidence_pointer: Model components and rules were chosen on all 72 patients before a 70:30 split; no external cohort, assay, calibration, decision curve, or baseline comparison; follow-up immature
concern: The subset is not independent and cannot establish mature three-year clinical validation.
resolution_test: Freeze all rules before evaluation in an external cohort with independent assay, adequate follow-up, clinical baselines, calibration, and utility.

claim_pointer: Abstract, Impact statement, and Discussion universal HCC claims
evidence_pointer: One-centre resection cohort: 58 viral, 9 metabolic, and 5 other or undocumented; no unresectable or treatment-selection cohort
concern: The sampled population cannot establish transportability across aetiologies, stages, centres, or treatment settings.
resolution_test: Prespecify the intended population and validate across claimed settings with subgroup calibration and failure checks, or narrow claims.

claim_pointer: Single-cell immune-evasion programme and five-gene score discovery
evidence_pointer: Cells from eight patients treated as independent in Wilcoxon tests; nominal P<0.05 without correction; 1,842 genes reported; r=-0.41, P=0.03 across eight tumours
concern: Cell-level pseudoreplication and uncorrected screening can invalidate the candidate pool, and the reported r/P pair requires reconciliation.
resolution_test: Reanalyse at patient level with pseudobulk or mixed models, FDR, effect sizes, leave-one-patient-out sensitivity, and independent correlation recomputation.

claim_pointer: Discussion “validated in an independent subset”; Abstract performance claims
evidence_pointer: All feature selection, cutoffs, signs, and missing-value rules used all 72 patients before splitting the same cohort
concern: The validation subset informed model construction and its performance is optimistically biased.
resolution_test: Apply a completely prespecified formula to an untouched external cohort or use nested resampling with every operation inside training folds; report optimism-corrected intervals.

claim_pointer: Abstract AUC 0.91; Results 0.84; Figure 3 legend 0.86; Discussion immediate-use claim
evidence_pointer: Median survivor follow-up 18 months; many three-year outcomes unavailable; ROC estimator, censoring handling, at-risk counts, intervals, code, and outputs absent
concern: Three incompatible AUCs and incomplete observation leave the headline discrimination estimate unreconciled and potentially biased or undefined.
resolution_test: Specify one time-dependent estimand and analysis set, report censoring method, at-risk and event counts and uncertainty, and reproduce one value from deposited code and data.

claim_pointer: Results selected multivariable hazard ratio 2.4, P=0.04
evidence_pointer: 31 deaths; 27 genes plus 18 covariates; stepwise selection; analysis-wise exclusions; no sample-size rationale; PH untested; no intervals or final model
concern: The model is likely unstable and its inference anti-conservative under the reported event count, selection, missingness, and unchecked assumptions.
resolution_test: Provide analysis flows and effective events, justify penalization or prespecification, report full model, intervals, PH diagnostics, and bootstrap and missing-data sensitivities.

claim_pointer: Data and code availability and all score claims
evidence_pointer: Raw single-cell data, model code, coefficients, patient-level dataset, seeds, software versions, figures, tables, and supplements are not deposited or supplied
concern: The discovery and score cannot be independently reconstructed, audited, or applied.
resolution_test: Deposit de-identified raw and processed data, metadata, executable code, exact formula and rules, seeds, locked environment, and a clean-run reproduction log.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Results anti-PD-1 sensitization claims
evidence_pointer: n=5 per EVA1 group; all mice received anti-PD-1; cage-order assignment; unblinded day-21 t-test; no repeat
concern: The design does not estimate an EVA1-by-treatment interaction and provides fragile inference.
resolution_test: Run randomized, concealed, blinded, replicated 2-by-2 experiments with prespecified longitudinal analysis and interaction effect sizes and intervals.

claim_pointer: Abstract AUC 0.91; Results 0.84; Figure 3 legend 0.86
evidence_pointer: The three supplied locations conflict; Results reports 18-month median follow-up and incomplete three-year outcomes; figures, code, and source tables absent
concern: At least two values are wrong or refer to undisclosed analyses, and the evaluable set is undefined.
resolution_test: Reconcile one prespecified estimand and value across text and display; report analysis set, censoring handling, horizon method, uncertainty, and source reproduction.

claim_pointer: Discussion “validated in an independent subset”
evidence_pointer: Methods says selection, cutoffs, coefficient signs, and missing-value rules used the entire cohort before splitting; no external cohort
concern: The described subset is not independent of model development.
resolution_test: Replace independent-validation language with accurate internal evaluation or demonstrate an untouched cohort never used for any selection or tuning.

claim_pointer: Title, Abstract, Introduction, Results, and Discussion causal EVA1 immune-control claims
evidence_pointer: Tumour correlation plus one-guide depletion with growth, PD-L1, and transcript readouts; no immune co-culture, second guide, rescue, or target engagement
concern: The evidence supports association and perturbation-linked phenotypes, not the stated causal immune-escape mechanism.
resolution_test: Moderate causal and immune-control language or provide orthogonal perturbation, rescue, and direct immune-function evidence.

claim_pointer: Abstract, Results, and Impact statement anti-PD-1 sensitization and treatment-strategy claims
evidence_pointer: All mice received anti-PD-1; no negative arm, immune infiltration, target persistence, survival, toxicity, or repeat
concern: A depletion effect during shared anti-PD-1 exposure does not establish sensitization or interaction.
resolution_test: Remove sensitization and treatment-strategy claims or demonstrate a replicated factorial interaction with immune and target-engagement readouts.

claim_pointer: Title, Abstract, Impact statement, Introduction, and Discussion universal, deployable anti-PD-1 biomarker claims
evidence_pointer: One retrospective resection cohort; no external cohort, assay, calibration, decision analysis, clinical baseline, or immunotherapy-response cohort
concern: The evidence does not establish deployability, anti-PD-1 benefit prediction, or universal clinical applicability.
resolution_test: Restrict to retrospective survival association or supply external intended-use validation with locked assay and model, calibration, comparators, and treatment interaction.

claim_pointer: Discussion cites reference 2 for five-gene-score benefit from anti-PD-1 monotherapy
evidence_pointer: Visible title is “Atezolizumab plus bevacizumab in unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma”; no five-gene score is named and full text was unavailable
concern: The visible bibliographic scope does not match the biomarker-specific monotherapy-benefit claim; exact support remains unverified.
resolution_test: Split treatment-efficacy from biomarker-prediction claims, provide direct support for each or remove the attribution, and verify full text.

claim_pointer: Introduction cites reference 1 for no prior immune signature having clinical utility
evidence_pointer: Visible title concerns comprehensive and integrative genomic characterization; full text unavailable
concern: One genomic-characterization citation cannot visibly substantiate an exhaustive field-wide negative claim.
resolution_test: Narrow the statement or support it with a current evidence synthesis and verify exact semantic support.

claim_pointer: Figure legends 1-4
evidence_pointer: Legends omit sample or unit definitions, group sizes, uncertainty, tests, and panel-level endpoints; images unavailable
concern: The legends are not self-contained enough to interpret displays or reconcile them with text.
resolution_test: Add panel mapping, biological unit, n, groups, measures, uncertainty, tests, and abbreviations; confirm all text claims against final displays and sources.

claim_pointer: Results association is interpreted as EVA1 excluding T cells; Abstract calls EVA1 causal driver
evidence_pointer: EVA1 higher in low-infiltration tumours and inversely correlated with T-cell score across eight tumours
concern: The cross-sectional association cannot distinguish EVA1-driven exclusion from reverse causation, tumour composition, or another common cause.
resolution_test: Induce EVA1 loss after tumour establishment in an immune-competent model, include rescue, and serially measure T-cell entry before tumour-burden divergence.

claim_pointer: Results claims EVA1 directly suppresses anti-tumour immunity
evidence_pointer: One guide reduced cell growth and altered PD-L1 and three transcripts; no second guide, rescue, target engagement, or immune-cell assay
concern: Off-target or fitness and stress effects can explain the readouts, and no anti-tumour immune function was measured.
resolution_test: Require concordant independent perturbations, guide-resistant rescue, target engagement, and immune killing or activation under growth-matched conditions.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Results anti-PD-1 sensitization claims
evidence_pointer: All five-per-group mice received anti-PD-1; EVA1 depletion also reduced cell growth in vitro
concern: Without anti-PD-1-negative arms, sensitization cannot be distinguished from an anti-PD-1-independent growth effect.
resolution_test: Run a prespecified immune-competent 2-by-2 study with rescue and test the EVA1-by-treatment interaction; no interaction falsifies sensitization.

claim_pointer: Impact statement and Discussion claims score-guided anti-PD-1 treatment selection
evidence_pointer: Retrospective resection cohort and overall-survival endpoint; no anti-PD-1 comparison, clinical baseline, decision curve, or treatment interaction
concern: Prognosis under observed care does not identify differential anti-PD-1 benefit or net clinical benefit.
resolution_test: Lock the assay, formula, threshold, and population, then test score-by-treatment interaction in a prospective randomized comparative dataset with a meaningful endpoint.

claim_pointer: Discussion claims EVA1 is the causal link between the five-gene score and immune escape
evidence_pointer: Only EVA1 was perturbed; no mediation of score-survival association or contribution of the other four genes was tested
concern: The composite score, survival association, EVA1 perturbation, and immune escape remain parallel observations rather than one identified causal chain.
resolution_test: Measure score, EVA1, immune state, and outcomes in independent data, prespecify and test mediation, and perturb components to test whether the phenotype depends on EVA1.

claim_pointer: Title, Abstract, and Impact statement universal and all-aetiology claims
evidence_pointer: One centre with 58 viral, 9 metabolic, and 5 other or undocumented cases; two cell lines; one Huh7 xenograft; no external cohort
concern: Transportability and invariance of the EVA1 dependency and treatment interaction across claimed populations are untested.
resolution_test: Validate the locked score and EVA1-by-anti-PD-1 interaction in adequate aetiology strata and distinct models with prespecified heterogeneity tests.
